fields.label: Skill Name
fields.description: Short slug: lowercase letters, digits and hyphens (3-40 chars). Shown to the user without the internal 'custom-' prefix.

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: When off, the skill is kept as a draft and NOT pushed to the assistant on Apply.

fields.label: User Invocable
fields.description: When on, the skill can be triggered explicitly from the chat composer with a '/' command.

fields.label: Description
fields.description: One-line summary of when to use this skill (becomes the SKILL.md frontmatter description).

fields.label: Instructions (Markdown)
fields.description: Markdown body of the SKILL.md: what the assistant should do when this skill is used.

fields.label: Shared With
fields.description: Users this skill is shared with (read-only for them; only the owner can edit or re-share).
